new_terms.context: Refers to models that grow increasingly sparse where tokens choose experts from a pool.
The component that assigns each token to k experts in an MoE model.
A networking communication pattern used during the dispatch and combine steps of token routing.
A technique to hide communication latency where tokens ping pong between GPUs and LPUs.
The two primary operations in the token routing flow between GPUs and LPUs.
A specific system or framework introduced for large-scale inference optimization.

term_usages.attention ffn disaggregation (afd): 注意力与前馈网络解耦
